steps.action: The sardana (Catalan pronunciation: [səɾˈðanə]; with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.
steps.text: The sardana (Catalan pronunciation: [səɾˈðanə]; with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.

steps.action: The steps are meticulously counted as two- or th
steps.text: The steps are meticulously counted as two- or three-step movements taken sideways within the circle.

steps.action: The direction of the steps is alternated.
steps.text: The direction of the steps is alternated.

steps.action: The hands stay on the hip or shoulder level depe
steps.text: The hands stay on the hip or shoulder level depending on the step structure.

steps.action: Usually there is more than one circle with varyi
steps.text: Usually there is more than one circle with varying tempo and levels of dance knowledge.

steps.action: Professional dancers organise themselves in coll
steps.text: Professional dancers organise themselves in colles sardanistes, colla meaning group or club.

steps.action: Brief public dances are known as ballades.
steps.text: Brief public dances are known as ballades.

steps.action: From the 16th century to the 19th century a folk
steps.text: From the 16th century to the 19th century a folk dance known as sardana propagated around the territory of the present province of Girona.

steps.action: The sardana was a popular dance in Empordà, Ross
steps.text: The sardana was a popular dance in Empordà, Rosselló and Garrotxa at the middle of the 19th century.

steps.action: This imagined account is the legendary origin of
steps.text: This imagined account is the legendary origin of the dance.

steps.action: In parallel, influences to the music composition
steps.text: In parallel, influences to the music composition of sardana llarga include the popular Italian and German operas of the time as well as Contrapàs, a Catalan dance which in religious celebrations preceded sardana curta.

steps.action: As a consequence, people started counting steps
steps.text: As a consequence, people started counting steps in order to finish at the same time.

steps.action: Choreography was updated with slight differences
steps.text: Choreography was updated with slight differences from the original North-Catalan dance.

steps.action: Pep Ventura is credited for stabilizing the diff
steps.text: Pep Ventura is credited for stabilizing the different variants around a clear 68 rhythm and making the instrumental ensemble of a fixed size.

steps.action: He included the today's standard long steps (els
steps.text: He included the today's standard long steps (els llargs) and the eleven player cobla band.

steps.action: Though some Iberian and Mediterranean circle dan
steps.text: Though some Iberian and Mediterranean circle dances follow similar patterns, instrumental music for the sardana has achieved a complexity of its own.

steps.action: In 1850 Miquel Pardàs publishes Método per apren
steps.text: In 1850 Miquel Pardàs publishes Método per aprender á ballar sardanas llargas ('Method to learn how to dance sardana llarga').

steps.action: By 1860 the dance was popular in Barcelona and f
steps.text: By 1860 the dance was popular in Barcelona and from there it disseminated through Catalan towns and villages.

steps.action: Between 1840 and 1860 the sardana was establishe
steps.text: Between 1840 and 1860 the sardana was established as "dance of the Catalans".

steps.action: Its influence was extended throughout the 20th c
steps.text: Its influence was extended throughout the 20th century thanks to the dance group Obra del Ballet Popular, which organised aplecs and other sardana events in communities where it was previously unknown.

steps.action: Even more, pro-Franco Catalans continued to danc
steps.text: Even more, pro-Franco Catalans continued to dance sardana throughout the Franco period.

steps.action: People of all classes, ages, genres and origins
steps.text: People of all classes, ages, genres and origins are encouraged to dance sardana together.

steps.action: It is hard to believe this dance had emerged wit
steps.text: It is hard to believe this dance had emerged without expressing qualities appreciated by Catalans.

steps.action: In the case of sardana, the rigidity of the danc
steps.text: In the case of sardana, the rigidity of the dance rules and group exclusivity by those who follow the detailed rules is a handicap for inclusion.
